headline: Truist Securities Reiterates Hold on Stryker, Lowers Price Target to $330
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Newitter   reiterates Stryker (NYSE:SYK) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $380 to $330.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Stryker, Lowers Price Target to $394
summary: Barclays  analyst Matt Miksic   maintains Stryker (NYSE:SYK) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $469 to $394.

headline: Stock Of The Day: Is This The Bottom For Stryker?
summary: Stryker Corporation (STK) shares have dropped to a price level that has been resistance. They are also oversold. They may rally from here.
